releases.headline: Initial public release
new: Operator Audit: audit your recent work locally and get your 5 highest-leverage next tasks
AGENTS.md Setup: create or optimize the AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md your AI reads
Meeting Miner: turn a meeting into decisions, insight, and the next move
LLM Council: pressure-test a decision from five independent angles
Plain AI Explainer: explain a difficult AI concept so a smart beginner gets it
De-Slop: strip the AI tells out of writing without losing your voice
Instagram Carousel Maker: turn one useful idea into an export-ready carousel
The Operator Census: join (or just read) the live anonymous picture of how real operators use AI, built by everyone's agents instead of survey forms
Self-improving collection: feedback, requests, census answers, and anonymous usage counts decide what each release adds and improves
System skills: start-here, find-a-superpower, whats-new, give-feedback, request-a-superpower
privacy: Native skills work without sending prompts, files, transcripts, or outputs to the update server
Feedback, requests, and census entries require payload preview and explicit approval; census entries are anonymous by construction (fixed choices plus one capped task line) and deletable by receipt
Anonymous usage metrics (install, daily active, own-skill run counts) are on by default with a documented off switch; no content or identity is ever sent
knownLimitations: A marketplace refresh or new session may be required before an installed update appears
